Zod: .nullable().optional() + ?? undefined (NOT ?? 0). TWO API CLIENTS: src/lib/api.ts (axios) + src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch). shadcn needs CSS vars in :root + tailwind mappings. SQLite tests: no server_default, datetime.now(UTC), StaticPool. CRUD uses flush() not commit() — get_db() auto-commits. deals.py is a package: deals/__init__.py assembles sub-routers, fixed-path before parameterized. Filter utils use Any not Column for mypy compat. Settings split into 7 groups via multiple inheritance. staleTime constants in src/lib/constants/query.ts. Reporting types in src/types/reporting.ts. fetchProperties defaults limit=500. New imports default to DealStage.DEAD (not INITIAL_REVIEW). File monitor uses asyncio.to_thread() for sync CRUD.
